titleStmt.title: SII 31.144: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 144. (A.R. No. B 103 of 1938.) ŚRĪRANGAM, TRICHINOPOLY TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east wall of the Garuḍamaṇḍapa in the temple of Śrī Ranganathasvāmi.
It is dated in Śaka 1593, Virōdhikṛit, Phālguna, śu. 13, Friday, Makhā corresponding to March 1, Friday 1672 A.D.
Records the gift of land to the temple by Chōḍa Aḷagāri, the pradhāni and the son of Kāpanāyaka and the grandson of Chōḍi-Aḷagādrināyaka on behalf Viśvanathanāyaka Chokkanāthanāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: (Published in South Indaia Inscription Volume XXIV. Ins. No. 549, p 531-32.)

śubhamastu . svastiśrī śakābdhaṁ 1593 yiṁddu mīṁdaṁ celleṭi virōdhikṛtu saṁvatsaraṁ phālguṇa śu 13 bhṛguvāraṁnāḍu makhā
nakṣatraṁ kūḍina yīśubhadinamaṁdu dakṣiṇapugaṭuna pāṁḍikulāśini vaḷanāgu nityōtsavavīdhi vaḷanāgu tiruparaṁgaṁ tirapati
perumāḷlu śrīraṁganādhasvāmi śrībhaṁḍārānaku śrīmatu viśvanādhanāyani cokkanādhanayyavāri kaiṁkkarya
vuṁddēcōṭi Aḷagādināyyani pautṛḍu kāpa nāyani putṛṁḍḍu pradhānicōṭi Āḷagādri sāṣṭāṁga samaskāraṁ samarpiṁci śrī raṁgganāya
kula kōvila vrōśiyicina kramaṁ nākaiṁkaryamugānu rēvu kāvēriki pu
prākā
Digital edition of SII 31.144 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
